query: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool repair status latest news June July 2026, algae paint peeling, is the pool fully repaired, lawsuit status
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Is the pool fully repaired? No.** As of mid-July 2026, the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool has been **drained a second time** (starting ~July 5–6, after July 4 fireworks) for a "permanent repair" and remains fenced off with no confirmed completion date.

**What went wrong:** After the ~$14.6M–$16M renovation completed June 3–5, 2026 (blue polyurea coating + nanobubbler filtration), the pool quickly developed an **algae bloom** (turned green ~June 16–19) and the **blue coating peeled/floated to the surface** (~June 18, within two weeks of completion).

**Vandalism claims:** Trump/Burgum alleged sabotage (fertilizer + a "350-foot" knife slit); 6 arrested, 7 cited — but no public evidence released. The repair is going to **the same no-bid contractor** (Atlantic Industrial Coatings) that did the original work.

**Lawsuit status:** *Cultural Landscape Foundation v. DOI* (1:26-cv-01593, D.D.C., filed May 11, 2026) alleging NHPA Section 106 and NEPA violations remains **active and unresolved**. Judge Carl Nichols effectively **denied the preliminary injunction** (May 21 hearing), and the government filed a **motion to dismiss** (June 18) on standing/mootness grounds. No final ruling.

The full report, key facts, sources, and quantitative data points have been delivered via the structured output.

sources.title: Reflecting Pool being drained – again – as Trump administration tries once more to fix landmark
sources.snippet: Crews began draining the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on Sunday, according to Interior Secretary Doug Burgum, for the second time in three months.

sources.title: Crews draining Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool again as part of Trump's revamp
sources.snippet: Crews are again draining the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool as Trump's problem-plagued efforts push well past his July 4 goal.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool Repairs Awarded to Same No-Bid Contractor
sources.snippet: Atlantic Industrial Coatings awarded the repair; initial no-bid contract $13.1M, ballooned to $14.6M; ~20% margin.

sources.title: 'Permanent repair' to Reflecting Pool to come around July 4, Trump says
sources.snippet: Trump said the pool will be drained again for 'permanent repair' around July 4; six arrested for alleged vandalism.

sources.title: Trump Admin Moves to Dismiss Reflecting Pool Lawsuit
sources.snippet: Government moved to dismiss arguing plaintiffs lack standing and claims are moot now project is complete; joint status report filed June 18.

sources.title: Judge Mulls if He Can Undo Trump Reflecting Pool Project Later
sources.snippet: Judge Carl Nichols held May 21 hearing; no immediate injunction; may decide on merits later when work could be undone.

sources.title: Beautification Out of the (American Flag) Blue: The Lawsuit That Attempted to Halt the Reflecting Pool Makeover
sources.snippet: Case 1:26-cv-01593 (D.D.C.); NHPA Section 106 and NEPA claims; preliminary injunction effectively denied; resurfacing completed June 3, 2026.

sources.title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool. But scientists aren't surprised
sources.snippet: Pool turned deep green with algae shortly after renovation; scientists unsurprised.

sources.title: Blue material peeling off bottom of Reflecting Pool, days after costly renovation
sources.snippet: Blue coating material observed peeling and partially detached at the pool bottom days after refilling.

sources.title: The Cultural Landscape Foundation Sues Department of the Interior Over the Painting of the Reflecting Pool
sources.snippet: Washington Litigation Group filed suit May 11, 2026 on behalf of TCLF and Charles Birnbaum.

sources.title: Trump ups Reflecting Pool renovation projections to 'less than $20 million' amid court fight
sources.snippet: Trump said cost would be 'less than $20 million'; federal judge heard arguments May 21.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
sources.snippet: In 2026 the pool was resurfaced with a blue polyurea coating and a nanobubbler filtration system was added; 2,030-by-167-foot pool holding ~4M gallons.

sources.title: Firm that worked on past Reflecting Pool renovation passed on Trump project after deeming it 'unfeasible'
sources.snippet: A prior renovation firm declined the project, balking at the July 4 deadline and blue-bottom requirement.

sources.title: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool being drained again as fencing surrounds landmark
sources.snippet: Crews started draining the pool for the second time in three months; new fencing surrounds the landmark.

Renovation cost after additional NPS work
Green Water Solutions algae-treatment no-bid contract
People arrested for alleged Reflecting Pool vandalism
